response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify song segments and conversational bridge. 2. Identified 'Team Tomodachi' and 'PANTS' as the two songs. 3. Used on-screen credits for metadata resolution. 4. Conducted searches to confirm artist details and retrieve lyrics, ultimately relying on transcription for precise, niche content.
response.global_summary: The video features two VTubers, Usada Pekora and Sakura Miko, performing a song titled 'Team Tomodachi', followed by a conversational segment and a second musical performance of the song 'PANTS', accompanied by a group of frog characters.

scenes.description: The two performers engage in a conversation.
A musical performance of the song 'PANTS' with a large group of frog dancers. Credits appear on screen for lyricist Takaya Mic Mitsunago and composer Double Clopparz.
